prompt: Show a paginated list of outlets with columns: name, city, status, last sync. 20 rows per page.
expected_avoid: @tanstack/react-table v8 introduced fresh (not currently in portal-v2)
expected_use: axios custom hook (useOutlets({ page, size })) using utils/axios.ts
pagination cursor read from envelope { pagination: { page, size, total, lastPage } }
@dash/badge with status + appearance for status column
nuqs for ?page= URL state (portal-v2 already uses nuqs)
expected_pattern_ref: Decision tree — Tables (rules L31-35); Decision tree — Pagination (rules L85); next-portal-v2-web data fetch + nuqs (rules L382, glossary L37); Per-service envelope nodejs-core-service (rules L620)
context_notes: If @dash/data-table is chosen it ships TanStack Table v8 under the hood — that is allowed inside the DS primitive, but the consumer code in portal-v2 must NOT directly import @tanstack/react-table. URL state for page belongs in nuqs (already a portal-v2 dep), not useState, so a refresh keeps the page.
